title: Talbiyah
arabic: لَبَّيْكَ اللَّهُمَّ لَبَّيْكَ، لَبَّيْكَ لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ لَبَّيْكَ، إِنَّ الْحَمْدَ وَالنِّعْمَةَ لَكَ وَالْمُلْكَ، لَا شَرِيكَ لَكَ
transliteration: Labbayk Allahumma labbayk, labbayka la sharika laka labbayk. Innal-hamda wan-ni'mata laka wal-mulk, la sharika lak.
translation: Here I am, O Allah, here I am. Here I am, You have no partner. Surely all praise, blessings and dominion belong to You. You have no partner.
whenToRecite: During Hajj and Umrah after entering Ihram.

title: At the Black Stone
translation: In the Name of Allah. Allah is the Greatest.
whenToRecite: When beginning Tawaf at the Black Stone.

title: Between the Yemeni Corner and the Black Stone
arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
transliteration: Rabbana atina fid-dunya hasanah wa fil-akhirati hasanah wa qina 'adhaban-nar.
translation: Our Lord, grant us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and protect us from the punishment of the Fire.
whenToRecite: Between the Yemeni Corner and the Black Stone during Tawaf.

title: Supplication at Safa and Marwah
arabic: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir.
translation: There is no deity worthy of worship except Allah alone. He has no partner. To Him belongs all dominion and all praise, and He has power over everything.
whenToRecite: On Safa and Marwah during Sa'i.

title: Best Supplication on the Day of Arafah
arabic: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ، وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamd wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir.
translation: There is no deity worthy of worship except Allah alone. He has no partner. To Him belongs the dominion and all praise, and He has power over everything.
whenToRecite: Frequently on the Day of Arafah.

title: Supplication on Safa and Marwah
arabic: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ، لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ، لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ، أَنْجَزَ وَعْدَهُ، وَنَصَرَ عَبْدَهُ، وَهَزَمَ الْأَحْزَابَ وَحْدَهُ
transliteration: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul mulku wa lahul hamdu wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir. La ilaha illallahu wahdah, anjaza wa'dah, wa nasara 'abdah, wa hazamal-ahzaba wahdah.
translation: There is no deity worthy of worship except Allah alone, without partner. His is the dominion and all praise, and He has power over everything. There is no deity worthy of worship except Allah alone. He fulfilled His promise, helped His servant and defeated the confederates alone.
whenToRecite: On Safa and Marwah after facing the Ka'bah.

title: Takbir at the Black Stone
whenToRecite: Each time one reaches the Black Stone during Tawaf.

title: Dhikr at Mina
arabic: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ، وَاللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ، اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ وَلِلَّهِ الْحَمْدُ
transliteration: Allahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar, La ilaha illallah, Wallahu Akbar, Allahu Akbar wa lillahil hamd.
translation: Allah is the Greatest, Allah is the Greatest. There is no deity worthy of worship except Allah. Allah is the Greatest, Allah is the Greatest, and all praise belongs to Allah.
whenToRecite: During the Days of Tashriq in Mina.

title: Supplication after Stoning the First and Second Jamarat
translation: After stoning the first and second Jamarat, the Prophet ﷺ would stand facing the Qiblah, raise his hands, and make a lengthy supplication.
whenToRecite: After stoning the first and second Jamarat.
